title: Extra Totems
description: A mod that adds 32 new totems to Minecraft
body:
# 🗿 32 Extra Totems

This mod adds **32 brand-new totems** to Minecraft, each with a unique and sometimes chaotic effect to spice up your gameplay. Whether you're farming, fighting, or fishing — there's a totem for that!

It also introduces a **new mob**, the **Totem Golem**, a powerful entity inspired by the Totem of Undying.

![New totems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ad004a5fbf2b995c584c11673a3cebb127442b.png)  
![The totem golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1dc8d34087380e674cd238cecd66dae0df88fa.jpeg)

---

## 🧿 Featured Totems  

Here are just some of the 32 unique totems included in the mod:

- 🎓 **XP Boost Totem** – Gain extra experience from all sources.  
- 💀 **Wither Totem** – Increase wither skeletyon drop rate but give you wither effect...
- 💾 **Keep Inventory Totem** – Prevents your inventory from dropping when you die.  
- 🎣 **Double Fishing Totem** – Doubles your fishing loot.

- 🧳 **Ender Chest Access Totem** – Opens your Ender Chest anywhere, anytime.  
- 🌾 **Farming Replant Totem** – Automatically replants crops when you harvest them.  
- 🍗 **Nutrition Totem** – An infinite-use edible totem that restores hunger.  
- 🧿 **Cursed Totem** – Cannot be removed and brings bad luck (e.g. anvils, fire...).

- 🌱 **Plant-Killer Totem** – Kills plants and strips logs around you.  
- ⚔️ **Totem of Pokémoning** – Mobs drop their spawn eggs when killed.  
- 🗿 **Charisma Totem** – Opens doors and trapdoors near you.  
- 🌳 **Deforestation Totem** – Fells an entire tree with one block break.

- 👶 **Totem of Youth** – Reverts nearby mobs to baby versions.  
- 🪨 **Golem Totem** – Summons a strong golem resembling the Totem of Undying.  
- 🌊 **Moses Totem** – Parts water like Moses and empties cauldrons.  
- 🏠 **Safe Place Totem** – Builds a protective shelter around you upon death.

- 🚿 **MLG Totem** – Gives you a chance to survive a fall with a water bucket MLG.  
- 🌼 **Bone Meal Totem** – Automatically fertilizes crops and plants.  
- 🍀 **Lucky Totem** – Applies a random effect or bonus when taking damage.

- 💞 **Totem of Love** – Causes nearby animals to enter love mode.  
- 💣 **TNT Totem** – Make the entities you hurt explode.

---

I hope you will find at least some totems that please you in order to use them in your adventure !

# LAir's End Update Compatibility

If you install my other mod, **LAir's End Update** (coming soon), you’ll gain access to new ways of obtaining **Totem Coins**, which are crafted using **Enderite Clusters**.

![Totem Coins craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ae2c9a65e051bb2761ea8316150773bc22944f.jpeg)

With this mod installed, you’ll also find:
- **Totem Traders** in End villages who will trade totems for Totem Coins.
- **Totems hidden throughout the End Shroom biome**, available exclusively via the LAir's End Update mod.

![The totem trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e501ad491a34dd87e75687115dfeacf72a07232.jpeg)

> Note: This compatibility is optional, you can still use this mod without installing the LAir's End Update.

🛠️ All totems were created for this video :
